During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Raikou V
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may draw a card.
Effects: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Zeraora VMAX
Effects: This attack does 60 damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon in play that has an Ability.
Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Zeraora VSTAR
Effects: You may discard a Stadium in play.

Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon 4 times. (You can choose the same Pokémon more than once. ) For each time you chose a Pokémon, do 60 damage to it. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Mewtwo VSTAR
Effects: Discard up to 3 [P] Energy from your Pokémon. This attack does 90 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
This attack does 120 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon V. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Deoxys VMAX
Ability-Effect: All of your Pokémon take 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon VSTAR (after applying Weakness and Resistance. )
Effects: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Deoxys VSTAR
Effects: This attack also does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon V. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
This attack does 60 damage for each Energy attached to both Active Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Hatterene VMAX
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may move up to 2 damage counters from your Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Zacian V
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a [P] Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each [P] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Drapion V
Ability-Effect: This Pokémon's attacks cost [C] less for each of your opponent's Single Strike, Rapid Strike, and Fusion Strike Pokémon in play.
Effects: This attack also does 60 damage to 1 of your Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Darkrai VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may put up to 2 Item cards from your discard pile into your hand. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each [D] Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Hisuian Samurott V
Effects: Discard up to 2 Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Pokémon.
Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Hisuian Samurott VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may put 4 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 110 more damage.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Hoopa V
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is [P] and [D] type.
Effects: Put 3 damage counters on 1 of your Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Zamazenta V
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may discard your hand and draw 5 cards. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Regigigas VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, if your opponent has exactly 1 Prize card remaining, you may choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. They discard that Pokémon and all attached cards. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Hisuian Zoroark VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may discard your hand and draw 7 cards. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: This attack does 50 damage for each of your Pokémon that has any damage counters on it.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Adaman
Description: You can use this card only if you discard 2 [M] Energy cards from your hand. Search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Cheren's Care
Description: Put 1 of your [C] Pokémon that has any damage counters on it and all attached cards into your hand.

Name: Colress's Experiment
Description: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck and put 3 of them into your hand. Put the other cards in the Lost Zone.

Name: Cynthia's Ambition
Description: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand instead.

Name: Gardenia's Vigor
Description: Draw 2 cards. If you drew any cards in this way, attach up to 2 [G] Energy cards from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Grant
Description: During this turn, your [F] Pokémon's attacks do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). During your turn, if this Grant is in your discard pile, you may discard 2 cards, except any Grant, from your hand. If you do, put this Grant into your hand. (This effect doesn't use up your Supporter card for the turn. )

Name: Irida
Description: Search your deck for a [W] Pokémon and an Item card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Melony
Description: Attach a [W] Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon V. If you do, draw 3 cards.

Name: Raihan
Description: You can play this card only if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn. Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon. If you do, search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Roxanne
Description: You can use this card only if your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining. Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, you draw 6 cards, and your opponent draws 2 cards.

Name: Origin Forme Palkia VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may attach up to 3 [W] Energy cards from your discard pile to your [W] Pokémon in any way you like. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Origin Forme Dialga VSTAR
Effects: This attack does 40 more damage for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Take another turn after this one. (Skip Pokémon Checkup. ) (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Giratina VSTAR
Effects: Put 2 Energy attached to your Pokémon in the Lost Zone.
You can use this attack only if you have 10 or more cards in the Lost Zone. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Arceus VSTAR
Ability-Effect: During your turn, you may search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can't use more than 1 VSTAR Power in a game. )
Effects: Search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon V in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VSTAR is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
